testcase.name: loginWithLockedUserFailureTest
testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: The error message when locked user trying to login is not as expected. Expected: is "Epic sadface: Sorry, this user has been locked....." but: was "Epic sadface: Sorry, this user has been locked out." at org.hamcrest.MatcherAssert.assertThat(MatcherAssert.java:20) at testCases.ErrorTestScenarios_LoginPage.loginWithLockedUserFailureTest(ErrorTestScenarios_LoginPage.java:52) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511) ... Removed 27 stack frames
